query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the concise summary of findings on the CHP çağrı heyeti / sulh hukuk mahkemesi situation as of late June / early July 2026:

**Direct answers to your questions:**

1. **Has Özel's team filed the Art. 75 application for a çağrı heyeti?** — **Not confirmed filed.** The application was publicly announced for **29 June 2026**, but it was then **postponed**. Özel's legal advisor Gül Çiftçi told Odatv that "technical matters" for the congress weren't ready, so "we will not make an application yet." As of **11 July 2026** (Türkiye Gazetesi), the petition was still only *planned* for "the following week."

2. **Has any court issued a decision?** — **No.** No court had issued a decision appointing a 3-person çağrı heyeti. Any Ankara court ruling was expected 1–3 months after an actual filing.

**Key context:**
- Root cause: the **21 May 2026 "mutlak butlan"** İstinaf decision that removed Özel and restored Kılıçdaroğlu.
- **833 delegate signatures** submitted 17 June (HQ: ~820 valid).
- The **111-MP call for a 12 July congress** is a separate *political* declaration — NOT the Art. 75 court filing.
- **20 July 2026** (start of judicial recess) was flagged as a critical threshold, with Özel's camp signaling a possible breakaway/new party if unresolved.

⚠️ Caveat: the situation was highly fluid; the latest dated source is 11 July 2026, so a filing could have occurred shortly after. Full report and structured data have been submitted.

sources.title: CHP'de gündem 'çağrı heyeti': Başvuru bugün denildi ama... Süreç hangi aşamada (Gül Çiftçi)
sources.snippet: Özel's legal advisor Gül Çiftçi: 'Kurultay için teknik bazı hususlar oluşuyor. O aşamaya gelinmediği için henüz bir başvuru yapmayacağız' — the announced 29 June sulh hukuk mahkemesi application was postponed.

sources.title: Özgür Özel için seçenekler tükeniyor! CHP'den kopacak ekip için zaman daralıyor
sources.snippet: As of 11 July 2026, çağrı heyeti/sulh hukuk mahkemesi petition still planned for the following week; no court decision yet; ruling expected 1–3 months after filing.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi büyüyor! Özel'in ekibi bugün mahkemeye gidiyor
sources.snippet: 29 June 2026: Özel's team planned to file at sulh hukuk mahkemesi requesting appointment of a çağrı heyeti; if accepted CHP to hold congress within 45 days.

sources.title: Kurultay talebi yargı yolunda
sources.snippet: If the butlan administration does not accept delegates' extraordinary-congress request, an application to the sulh hukuk mahkemesi would be made on Monday 29 June.

sources.title: CHP bugün mahkemelik oluyor
sources.snippet: Recounts 21 May İstinaf mutlak butlan decision, Kılıçdaroğlu's reinstatement, and 833 signatures submitted 17 June; court route to çağrı heyeti.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi mahkemeye taşınıyor
sources.snippet: Özel-supporting team to request court appointment of a çağrı heyeti; if accepted, CHP goes to extraordinary congress within 45 days.

sources.title: CHP'de 111 milletvekilinden kurultay çağrısı
sources.snippet: 111 CHP MPs including Özgür Özel called for an extraordinary congress on 12 July 2026, warning of election-exclusion risk.

sources.title: CHP kulisleri: Çağrı heyeti hamlesi, Anadolu Birliği Partisi iddiası
sources.snippet: Süleyman Bülbül: the 10-day period given to the butlan team expired; they will apply to court for appointment of a çağrı heyeti.

sources.title: İstinaf CHP için yapılan olağanüstü kurultay talebini reddetti
sources.snippet: 26 June 2026: İstinaf rejected a 'clarification' application tied to Kılıçdaroğlu's use of the tedbir decision to keep the extraordinary-congress door closed.

sources.title: CHP 38. Olağan İstanbul İl Kongresi davası 16 Ekim'e ertelendi
sources.snippet: 10 July 2026: CHP 38th Ordinary İstanbul Provincial Congress case postponed to 16 October 2026.

sources.title: 'Seçilmiş CHP'de yeni parti için kritik tarih 20 Temmuz
sources.snippet: 20 July 2026 (judicial recess) flagged as critical; Özel's team wanted Yargıtay to rule before then; new party discussed if no resolution.

sources.title: CHP'de karar haftası
sources.snippet: 833 signatures submitted; 10-day period given to HQ expired Friday; HQ announced ~820 valid signatures under review and had not responded.

data_points.metric: Delegate signatures submitted for extraordinary congress
Valid signatures per CHP HQ after disciplinary referrals/withdrawals
MPs signing the 12 July extraordinary-congress call declaration
Announced (later postponed) date for sulh hukuk mahkemesi çağrı heyeti application
Deadline within which CHP must hold congress if court appoints çağrı heyeti
Expected time for Ankara court to decide after a filing
